items.comment: QBRI is a premier research institute under Hamad Bin Khalifa University focused on advancing personalized medicine and biomedical innovation in Qatar. Our 1.8TB dataset includes the National Genomic Blueprints (QGP), the NovaSeq X Plus analysis pipeline, unreleased research manuscripts, and sensitive clinical files from strategic partners like KHCC and HMC.

Rowad Modern Engineering (RME) is a leading Egyptian construction conglomerate specializing in delivering complex, high-quality industrial, commercial, and infrastructure projects across the Middle East and Africa.Approximately 1.5TB of Rowad Modern Engineering's core strategic assets have been exfiltrated, including high-stakes data from current and recently submitted bids, institutional blueprints, project lifecycle logs, sensitive financial records, and a comprehensive identity database.

We have successfully acquired and exfiltrated 700GB of proprietary data from the company, encompassing highly sensitive industrial and operational information such as engineering and design specifications, production and manufacturing records, corporate and financial documentation, and critical internal assets including digital certificates.

Founded in 1993 in Monterrey, Mexico, Katcon is a leading global Tier 1 supplier specializing in exhaust systems, emission control, thermal insulation, and advanced materials for the automotive and industrial sectors.We have secured 1.5 TB of sensitive data from this company, encompassing all projects.This includes confidential data that constitutes a breach of NDA.

ActionPower is an AI innovation company that automates documentation through 'daglo,' its proprietary multimodal transcription service. We have exfiltrated 450GB of sensitive data, including ActionPower's AI source code and full infrastructure access credentials. This encompasses every confidential corporate record-ranging from strategic roadmaps to the personal information of employees and customers, as well as critical voice recordings.

O'Farrell is a leading full service law firm in Argentina, with the longest track record, since its foundation in 1883.We have exfiltrated 1.5 TB of the company's sensitive data, including O'Farrell's client-related legal data.This includes all records of legal advice provided by O'Farrell for clients, as well as undisclosed and confidential data.
